title: Serino 2015 peri-hand PPS Experiment 3
citation: Serino, A., Noel, J. P., Galli, G., Canzoneri, E., Marmaroli, P., Lissek, H., & Blanke, O. (2015). Body part-centered and full body-centered peripersonal space representations. Scientific Reports, 5, 18603.
notes: Peri-hand branch of the Serino body-part mapping series. Lateralized hand placement is stored in notes but not yet a GUI coordinate field.

provenance.source: Scientific Reports Experiment 3 reports five distances: 5, 27, 50, 71, and 93 cm.
Methods report 208 trials for Experiment 3 with 16 repetitions.
